choose.when: insert into ${tableString}(news_id, type_name, news_title, news_content, publish_timec, link, news_image, status_name, del_flag, update_by, update_time, biz_time, op) values (#{newsBase.newsId}, #{newsBase.typeName}, #{newsBase.newsTitle}, #{newsBase.newsContent}, #{newsBase.publishTime}, #{newsBase.link}, #{newsBase.newsImage}, #{newsBase.statusName}, #{newsBase.delFlag}, #{newsBase.updateBy}, #{newsBase.updateTime}, NOW(), 'insert');

insert into ${tableString}(news_id, type_name, news_title, news_content, publish_time, link, news_image, shstatus_namezt, del_flag, update_by, update_time, biz_time, op) values (#{newsBase.newsId}, #{newsBase.typeName}, #{newsBase.newsTitle}, #{newsBase.newsContent}, #{newsBase.publishTime}, #{newsBase.link}, #{newsBase.newsImage}, #{newsBase.statusName}, #{newsBase.delFlag}, #{newsBase.updateBy}, #{newsBase.updateTime}, NOW(), 'insert');

insert into ${tableString}(news_idc, type_name, news_title, news_content, publish_time, link, news_image, status_name, del_flag, update_by, update_time, biz_time, op) values (#{newsBase.newsId}, #{newsBase.typeName}, #{newsBase.newsTitle}, #{newsBase.newsContent}, #{newsBase.publishTime}, #{newsBase.link}, #{newsBase.newsImage}, #{newsBase.statusName}, #{newsBase.delFlag}, #{newsBase.updateBy}, #{newsBase.updateTime}, NOW(), 'insert');

insert into ${tableString}(news_idjq, type_name, news_title, news_content, publish_time, link, news_image, status_name, del_flag, update_by, update_time, biz_time, op) values (#{newsBase.newsId}, #{newsBase.typeName}, #{newsBase.newsTitle}, #{newsBase.newsContent}, #{newsBase.publishTime}, #{newsBase.link}, #{newsBase.newsImage}, #{newsBase.statusName}, #{newsBase.delFlag}, #{newsBase.updateTime}, #{newsBase.updateTime}, NOW(), 'insert');

insert into ${tableString}(news_id, type_name, news_title, news_content, publish_time, link, news_image, status_name, del_flag, gxzupdate_by, update_time, biz_time, op) values (#{newsBase.newsId}, #{newsBase.typeName}, #{newsBase.newsTitle}, #{newsBase.newsContent}, #{newsBase.publishTime}, #{newsBase.link}, #{newsBase.newsImage}, #{newsBase.statusName}, #{newsBase.delFlag}, #{newsBase.updateBy}, #{newsBase.updateTime}, NOW(), 'insert');

insert into ${tableString}(SPMC, type_name, news_title, news_content, publish_time, link, news_image, status_name, del_flag, update_by, update_time, biz_time, op) values (#{newsBase.newsId}, #{newsBase.typeName}, #{newsBase.newsTitle}, #{newsBase.newsContent}, #{newsBase.publishTime}, #{newsBase.link}, #{newsBase.newsImage}, #{newsBase.statusName}, #{newsBase.delFlag}, #{newsBase.updateBy}, #{newsBase.updateTime}, NOW(), 'insert');
choose.otherwise: insert into ${tableString}(news_id, type_name, news_title, news_content, publish_time, link, news_image, status_name, del_flag, update_by, update_time, biz_time, op) values (#{newsBase.newsId}, #{newsBase.typeName}, #{newsBase.newsTitle}, #{newsBase.newsContent}, #{newsBase.publishTime}, #{newsBase.link}, #{newsBase.newsImage}, #{newsBase.statusName}, #{newsBase.delFlag}, #{newsBase.updateBy}, #{newsBase.updateTime}, NOW(), 'insert');
